purpose: Cover first-month launch costs and promotion runway without storing financial credentials in the repository.

rankedOptions.name: Stripe Capital
rankedOptions.bestFor: Working capital after Stripe revenue starts flowing.
notes: Eligibility appears in Stripe Dashboard when available.
Repayment is based on sales activity.
No repository or site code is required.

rankedOptions.name: Stripe Balance Credits
rankedOptions.bestFor: Applying account/customer credit to offset first-month invoices.
notes: Requires a real Stripe customer ID.
Use only inside Stripe Dashboard or secure backend.
Do not commit customer IDs unless intentionally public/test data.

rankedOptions.name: External Funding → Stripe Balance
rankedOptions.bestFor: Early launch funding, grants, micro-loans, donations, or business capital.
notes: Use Stripe dashboard reporting for reconciliation.

rankedOptions.name: Stripe Coupons / Promotions
rankedOptions.bestFor: Free trials, first-month discounts, and launch promos without adding credit.
notes: Works with Payment Links and Checkout.
Best zero-cash option for launch incentives.

safeAutomationBoundaries: Do not store Stripe secret keys in the repository.
Do not store real customer IDs unless approved for operational docs.
Do not automate credit issuance without a secure backend and explicit operator approval.
Use coupons/promotions first when avoiding cash outlay.
